positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a mythical forest creature, like a glowing celestial fox or a griffin mixed with bioluminescent flora. The creature is sitting centrally on a moss-covered ancient root structure, looking directly at the viewer. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau and Pacific Northwest tattoo flash, utilizing thick, clean linework, limited but vibrant color palette (deep indigo, emerald green, gold, and creamy off-white), and heavy use of negative space to enhance the silhouette. The composition must be highly symmetrical and contained within a central medallion format, ideal for printing on a t-shirt. Background details should be intricate geometric patterns or stylized foliage, maintaining strong contrast and a mythic, ethereal glow emanating from the subject.
negative: blurry, noisy, grainy, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry background, photographic, realistic, jpeg artifacts, cropped, out of frame
